slides.title: The hidden muscle that keeps you *confident*.
slides.sub: Your pelvic floor is a sling of muscle that quietly supports your core. Here is how to keep it strong.

slides.title: A sling, not a switch
slides.body: The pelvic floor is a hammock of muscle at the base of your core. It *holds everything in place* while you move and breathe.

slides.title: Age and childbirth take a toll
slides.body: Like any muscle, this sling weakens over time. Pregnancy, birth and the years after *can stretch and soften it*.

slides.title: It guards continence
slides.body: A strong pelvic floor is linked to better bladder control. Training it *may help prevent* leaks long before they start.

slides.title: Your core's quiet anchor
slides.body: This sling works with your deep core to stabilize your spine. A stronger base *can support* posture, balance and easy movement.

slides.title: Treat it like any muscle
slides.body: Slow, deliberate contractions, done daily, build it back. Consistency *matters more than intensity*, just like the rest of your body.

slides.title: Build strength you can *feel*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your sleep, food, movement and steps into one daily Health Score, so the habits that keep your core strong actually stick.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The pelvic floor is the muscle almost no one trains, and it quietly decides how confident and mobile you feel as you age. 🌿

It is a sling that supports your core, weakens with age and childbirth, and responds to training like any other muscle. Save this for the days you remember to. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those small habits into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: The Hidden Muscle That Keeps You Strong as You Age
